lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: Oh! Hey there %username!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
My name is Dipper. I've been
finding some really weird stuff
around Gravity Falls...

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: Sorry i meant Geometry Falls!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
Like, REALLY weird.
Not normal weird.
Actually scary weird.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
Do you want to join
me and help figure
this all out?

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
Yes! I knew I could
count on you!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
Okay, first things first.
I'll bring you to
the Mystery Shack.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
Fair warning... my Grunkle Stan
is going to try to sell
you things. Just... ignore him.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: Don't care.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: You're coming anyway.

lines.speaker: Grunkle Stan
lines.text:
WELCOME! To the one,
the only... MYSTERY SHACK!

lines.speaker: Grunkle Stan
lines.text:
Home of the world's most
amazing mysteries!
Also souvenirs.

lines.speaker: Grunkle Stan
lines.text:
Can I interest you in
a genuine cursed totem?
Only $49.99. Batteries not included.

lines.speaker: Grunkle Stan
lines.text:
Or THIS! A bag of
authentic mystery rocks.
Dug up fresh last Tuesday.

lines.speaker: Grunkle Stan
lines.text:
A STEAL at only $89.
No refunds. No exchanges.
No crying.

lines.speaker: Grunkle Stan
lines.text:
What about this slightly used
mystery hat? Worn only once.
By a goat. But still!

lines.speaker: Grunkle Stan
lines.text:
Just $200! That's basically
free if you think about it
hard enough.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: Grunkle Stan, please stop.

lines.speaker: Grunkle Stan
lines.text:
Or how about this jar
of mystery air? Very rare.
Only $15.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
That is literally just
an empty jar.

lines.speaker: Grunkle Stan
lines.text:
Mystery air, kid.
Learn to read.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
We really need to get
out of here. Like now.
Like RIGHT now.

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text: DIPPER! DIPPER DIPPER DIPPER!

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text:
I'm coming with you!
I've got Waddles, my grappling
hook AND my new glitter cannon!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
You don't need
a glitter cannon.

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text:
I ALWAYS need
a glitter cannon, Dipper.

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text: Dudes.

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text:
I heard there was
an adventure happening?

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text:
Yeah. I'm coming too.
That's just how it is.

lines.speaker: Grunkle Stan
lines.text:
Nobody bought anything!
This is a DISASTER!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
Let's go. Quickly.
Before he finds
more jars to sell.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
Okay so... I've been
reading Journal 3 again.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
There's a page that mentions
something hidden nearby.
Something in a garage.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
The author underlined it
three times and wrote
'DO NOT OPEN' next to it.

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text:
So obviously we're
going to open it!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: ...Yes. Obviously.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
Check out THE GARAGE
button. Let's go see
what's in there.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
Okay... this is definitely
the place the Journal
was talking about.

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text:
It smells like old cheese
and secrets in here.

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text:
I once found a sandwich
in a garage. Best day
of my life, dude.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: Soos... focus.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
There's the vault door.
Hmmm... let's see
what's in here...

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text:
Ooh! Ooh! Maybe it's
a treasure! Or a puppy!
OR a treasure puppy!!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
It's definitely not
a treasure puppy, Mabel.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: ...Right?

lines.speaker: Monster
lines.text: HAHAHAHAHAHA!

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text: AAAAAAH!

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text: Whoa dude.

lines.speaker: Monster
lines.text:
Foolish little humans!
You dare enter MY vault?!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
W-we just wanted
to look around!

lines.speaker: Monster
lines.text:
You must complete my challenge
before you have ANY chance
of winning against me!

lines.speaker: Monster
lines.text:
Complete the level.
Then come back.
IF you survive.

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text: Did he say 'if'?

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: He said 'if'.

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text:
We're gonna be fine dudes.
Probably.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
We did it! We beat
the challenge!

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text: YEAHHH! Mabel style!

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text: That was pretty gnarly, dudes.

lines.speaker: Monster
lines.text: You... actually beat it.

lines.speaker: Monster
lines.text:
HOW did you beat it?!
NOBODY beats it!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: We're pretty good.

lines.speaker: Monster
lines.text:
I WON'T let you win!
You still have to
get past ME!

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text:
Dipper... he looks
really mad.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
Yeah. He does.
Get ready everyone.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
Okay okay okay.
Don't panic. I've got
the Journal right here.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
There's a page about
this exact type of monster!
We're actually kind of lucky!

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text:
LUCKY?! He's trying
to DESTROY us Dipper!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
Lucky because we know
what to use against him!
A bottle of water!

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text:
Dude I have one
in my backpack!
I always carry snacks.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
That's... actually perfect.
Throw the water bottle!
Press E!

lines.speaker: ITEM
lines.text:
You got a Water Bottle!
Press E to throw it!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: WAIT WAIT WAIT!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
I just turned the page
and it says... oh no.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
'Only use water as
a LAST resort because
it makes him very mad.'

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
Who WRITES sentences like that?!
Why is it on the SECOND page?!
Why not the FIRST page?!

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text:
Dipper... I think
it's already thrown...

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: Oh no.

lines.speaker: Monster
lines.text: HAHAHAHAHAHA!

lines.speaker: Monster
lines.text:
WATER?! YOU USED WATER?!
YOU ABSOLUTE FOOLS!

lines.speaker: Monster
lines.text:
Now I'm TWICE as strong!
You've made the biggest
mistake of your LIVES!

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text: Great job Dipper.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
It was YOUR idea
to open the vault!

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text:
I thought it was
a treasure puppy!!

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text: Dudes. DUDES.

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text: I got this.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
Soos what are
you doing?!

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text:
I always carry a
screwdriver. You know.
Just in case.

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text:
In case of MONSTER
fights?!

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text:
In case of anything, dude.
Mr. Pines taught me that.
Always be prepared.

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text:
Yo, use this bad boy
to fight him!
Press E to throw it!

lines.speaker: ITEM
lines.text:
You got a Screwdriver!
Press E to throw it!

lines.speaker: Monster
lines.text:
Ha! A SCREWDRIVER?!
What are you going
to do with THAT?!

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text: Throw it at you, dude.

lines.speaker: Monster
lines.text:
Noooo... impossible...
defeated by a... screwdriver...

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text: WE WON! WE ACTUALLY WON!

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text:
That's what I'm
talking about, dudes!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
I can't believe that
actually worked...

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
Wait. There's something
on the ground. A note.

lines.speaker: NOTE
lines.text:
Impressive. You defeated
my monster. I did not
expect that.

lines.speaker: NOTE
lines.text:
Come to the basement
to find me and collect
your reward...

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text:
Ooh! A reward!
Maybe it IS
a treasure puppy!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
It's not going to
be a treasure puppy.

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text: Could be a sandwich though.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
Let's go find this
'monster guider' and see
what's in that basement.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
And whatever you do...
don't touch anything.

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text: No promises!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
Okay, this is the basement.
Everyone stay close...

lines.speaker: Jeff
lines.text: HALT! Who goes th— Oh!

lines.speaker: Jeff
lines.text:
Mabel! My queen! You've
returned to us!

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text:
Ugh, Jeff? Is this
your basement?!

lines.speaker: Jeff
lines.text:
We put that monster there
to find a brave new queen.
And you defeated it!

lines.speaker: Jeff
lines.text:
The offer is still
on the table, Mabel.
We have a leaf-throne!

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text:
Hard pass, Jeff.
I'm still washing the
gnome-burp out of my hair.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
Wait, did you gnomes
create that challenge level?

lines.speaker: Jeff
lines.text:
Oh, heavens no. We're gnomes,
not creators.
We stole it from Gideon.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
Gideon Gleeful?! I knew
that level felt... evil.
And poorly balanced.

lines.speaker: Jeff
lines.text:
I heard you can beat him by completing all his levels,
but you can't just search for the levels...

lines.speaker: Jeff
lines.text:
But we stole some of them!
I can give them to you.

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text:
The Journal says if we
beat all his levels, we
can finally stop him.

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text:
I'm in, dawg. Gideon's
hair is too big to be trusted.

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text: Let's go take him down!

lines.speaker: Jeff
lines.text:
Before you go, you need
training. Fight our
strongest warrior!

lines.speaker: Schmebulock
lines.text: SCHMEBULOCK!!

lines.speaker: Jeff
lines.text: Okay, thats maybe not that good of an idea...

lines.speaker: Jeff
lines.text:
Here is the level
I hope you can beat it

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: Yes! Good job %username! you beat the level!

lines.speaker: Jeff
lines.text: Woah! That was faster than i thought!

lines.speaker: Jeff
lines.text: Maybe i should get harder levels...

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text: You did it!

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text: But i didn't feel very safe with that spike-ball...

lines.speaker: Jeff
lines.text: Yeah, Gideon doen't use the cutest objects in his levels. I learned that in expierience!

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text: Lets go back to the shack! We have to fight Gideon.

lines.speaker: Jeff
lines.text: Wait! I also have some things to say to Gideon!

lines.speaker: Jeff
lines.text: GNOMES OF THE FOREST, ASEMBLE!!!!!!!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: Yes! This is going to work!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: Grunkle Stan!

lines.speaker: Grunkle Stan
lines.text: What is it? I was just making a new scam...

lines.speaker: Grunkle Stan
lines.text: Wait you brougt him again? He didn't buy anything!

lines.speaker: Grunkle Stan
lines.text: But you did brougt a new one!

lines.speaker: Grunkle Stan
lines.text: Welcome to a world of mystery! Here! buy these mystery rocks! Only 50 dollars per piece!

lines.speaker: Jeff
lines.text: Ooooh! Mystery rocks!

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text: Grunkle Stan, we need you to fight with Gideon.

lines.speaker: Grunkle Stan
lines.text: Is that brat out of jail? He ruined the mystery shack!

lines.speaker: Grunkle Stan
lines.text: Lets roll!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: WAIT!

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text: What is it dude?

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: We don't know where gideon is at! he could be anywhere!

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text: A wise man once told me 'The world is big, but Geomerty falls isn't'

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text: He can't be far! Gnome-guy! Where are you getting the levels?

lines.speaker: Jeff
lines.text: From his account, GideonGleeful

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text: Hey! %username! go to that account!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: Ah! we are here!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: I tought it would be a bit harder to get here...

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text: Hey, it's not like anything is going to happen!

lines.speaker: Mabel
lines.text: Because we have a GLITTER CANON!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: Mabel, this is serious

lines.speaker: Jeff
lines.text: Yeah! Gideon should be stoppen

lines.speaker: Soos
lines.text: Watch out for traps!

lines.speaker: Grunkle Stan
lines.text: You know, my mystery rocks would be perfect to use now!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: FOCUS!

lines.speaker: Dipper
lines.text: Lets go to the levels! The journal can maybe help!
